task_objective: Decrease the font size of the Last Operation label and value and reduce the vertical spacing between the Status and Last Operation fields in the QAM panel.
design_decisions: Reverted the Status field padding to standard to maintain its original padding/spacing relative to the Select Game dropdown above it.
Set the Last Operation field to padding="compact" to natively shrink its vertical footprint.
Add a custom scoped className `sdh-ludusavi-last-operation-field` to the Last Operation `Field` component to target internal dynamically-hashed class names like `[class*="Label"]` natively in CSS.
Use a subtle `-6px` margin-top on the Last Operation field to pull it closer to the Status field without causing outline focus overlaps.
Set the Last Operation value font size to `12px` and timestamp to `10px` for a premium compact appearance.
results: Successfully verified that the styling compiles, all 232 automated tests pass, and formatting/lint checks are complete.
